channel.title: system on 迁移自(blog.csdn.net/xiaobin_HLJ80)
channel.description: Recent content in system on 迁移自(blog.csdn.net/xiaobin_HLJ80)

item.title: 查看版本-Ubuntu
item.description: components version 查看内核版本: #uname -a 查看Glibc库版本 #apt-cache show libc6 查看binutils版本 #ld -v 查看ubuntu版本号 #cat /etc/issue 查看debian对应版本 #cat /etc/debian_version debian code name code version status bullseye 11 statble buster 10 old statble stretch 9 old old statble jessie 8 archived wheezy 7 obsolete squeeze 6.0 obsolete lenny 5.0 obsolete etch 4.0 obsolete sarge 3.1 obsolete woody 3.0 obsolete potato 2.2 obsolete slink 2.1 obsolete hamm 2.0 obsolete
